case_title: ANGELES ROBERT N et al VS WONG MGI YUNG DBA HOT AND SPICY RESTAURANT et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANGELES ROBERT N ANGELES TERESITA C IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WONG MGI YUNG DBA HOT AND SPICY RESTAURANT HSIEH FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WONG MGI YUNG DBA HOT AND SPICY RESTAURANT HSIEH FRANCISCO AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ANGELES ROBERT N ANGELES TERESITA C ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-16-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
